title: Enhaced Beaches and Shores
description: A Datapack to Enhance Minecrafts Shore regions
body:
A Datapack that Enhances Minecrafts Shore Regions
This is what you can expect from this Datapack:

New Features:
-while exploring the Coast regions of Minecraft you will now be able to find Tide Pools !
-Tide Pools will be different for Beaches and Stony Shores

New Structure:
-you will now find "Fisher Hut" structures when exploring beaches
-in the Fisher Huts you will be able to meet a Fisherman Villager

If you are looking for a Minecraft Beach and Stony Shore Update this might be what youre looking for !

Hope you enjoy this Datapack !
